query: 品牌核心元素： 品牌标志：RAN QIU 标志 主色调：#8B3A1E（深秋棕红）、#E8DCCB（米色）、#D4A574（金棕色） 设计风格：东方美学、极简主义、自然诗意、温暖治愈   视觉语言：充足留白、浅景深、暖色调、金色时光 制作一张符合品牌调性的宣传海报。采用温暖的秋日氛围，结合品牌标志和自然元素，营造诗意而宁静的视觉体验。

final_prompt.prompt: 品牌核心元素： 品牌标志：RAN QIU 标志 主色调：#8B3A1E（深秋棕红）、#E8DCCB（米色）、#D4A574（金棕色） 设计风格：东方美学、极简主义、自然诗意、温暖治愈   视觉语言：充足留白、浅景深、暖色调、金色时光 制作一张符合品牌调性的宣传海报。采用温暖的秋日氛围，结合品牌标志和自然元素，营造诗意而宁静的视觉体验。

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为 RAN QIU 品牌生成一张符合品牌调性的宣传海报。

风格/介质:东方美学海报设计,极简主义,自然诗意,温暖治愈,东方禅意与当代极简融合
构图:充足留白构图,浅景深效果,画面主体偏左或偏右留出呼吸空间,16:9 横版比例
主体:RAN QIU 品牌标志置于画面视觉中心偏上位置,搭配秋日自然元素(落叶、枯枝、暖光)
场景/背景:秋日户外自然场景,柔和的暖色调环境,金色时光(黄金时刻)光线
光线/氛围:金色时光侧逆光,暖色调漫射光,柔和阴影,宁静诗意的整体氛围
色彩搭配:深秋棕红 #8B3A1E 作为视觉锚点,米色 #E8DCCB 做底色与留白,金棕色 #D4A574 做点缀过渡
材质/纹理:自然纸张质感,轻微纹理,温暖而不粗糙
文字(原文保留):"RAN QIU"
约束:品牌标志清晰可识别;整体色调严格遵循品牌色系统;留白不少于画面 40%
避免:高饱和撞色、复杂装饰元素、冷色调、过度锐化、商业感过重的排版

Use case: brand-poster
Asset type: promotional poster for lifestyle brand
Primary request: warm autumn atmosphere brand poster featuring RAN QIU logo with natural elements, poetic and serene visual experience
Scene/backdrop: golden hour autumn landscape with soft natural elements like dried grass, fallen leaves, gentle sunlight filtering through trees, generous negative space
Subject: RAN QIU brand logo prominently placed, surrounded by minimal natural autumn elements
Style/medium: editorial photography style, oriental aesthetics, minimalist design
Composition/framing: balanced layout with generous white space, shallow depth of field, logo as focal point
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm lighting, soft diffused sunlight, warm and healing atmosphere
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown), warm earth tones
Materials/textures: natural paper texture, soft fabric, organic dried botanical elements
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: maintain minimalist aesthetic with ample negative space, keep color palette strictly to brand colors #8B3A1E #E8DCCB #D4A574
Avoid: cluttered composition, oversaturated colors, cold blue tones, busy patterns, harsh shadows

Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU" that conveys autumn warmth and poetic tranquility.

Style/medium: minimalist editorial poster design with East Asian aesthetic sensibility, clean typography, poetic and healing visual tone
Composition: centered brand mark with generous negative space, balanced layout with shallow depth of field effect
Subject: brand wordmark "RAN QIU" as the focal point, integrated with subtle natural autumn elements (dried leaves, warm light, organic textures)
Scene/backdrop: soft warm autumn atmosphere with golden hour lighting, blurred natural background suggesting peaceful outdoor setting
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour light, soft and diffused, creating a serene and comforting mood
Color palette: deep autumn brown-red (#8B3A1E) as anchor, beige (#E8DCCB) as base, golden brown (#D4A574) as accent, harmonious warm palette with generous white space
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, natural organic surfaces, soft gradients
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain legibility at various sizes; minimalist approach with abundant white space; no competing visual elements
Avoid: cluttered composition, cold color tones, harsh shadows, neon colors, over-saturated palette, generic stock photo aesthetic, gradients unless subtle
